import React, { useEffect, useContext, useState } from 'react' import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import { Navbar } from './Navbar'; import CartContext from '../context/CartContext'; import profileContext from '../context/profilecontext' export const OrderSummary = () => { const date = Date.now() const { history, gethistory } = useContext(CartContext); const { profiles } = useContext(profileContext) const [Total, setTotal] = useState(0) const timeElapsed = Date.now(); const today = new Date(timeElapsed); const orderno = Math.floor((Math.random() * 10000000) + 1); useEffect(() => { gethistory() }, []) useEffect(() => { calculateTotal(); }); const calculateTotal = () => { let total = 0; history.filter((newp)=> newp.time > (Date.now()-240000)).map((items) => { total += parseInt(items.price, 10) * items.quantity }) setTotal(total) } return ( <>
{ profiles.map((profile)=>{ return
Your order Confirmed!
Hello, {profile.firstname} You order has been confirmed and will be shipped in next two days!
}) }
{ profiles.map((profile) => { return }) }
Order Date {today.toDateString()}
Order No MT{orderno}
Payment
Shiping Address {profile.address},{profile.city},{profile.state},{profile.pincode}
{ history.filter((newp)=> newp.time > (Date.now()-240000)).map((item) => { return
{item.title}
Quantity:{item.quantity}
₹{item.price}
}) }
Subtotal
₹{Total}
Shipping Fee
₹22
{Total}
₹ {Total + 22}

We will be sending shipping confirmation email when the item shipped successfully!

Thanks for shopping with us!

Foode Team
Need Help? visit our help center {today.toDateString()}
) }
